name: Barukh Transportation LLC

notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate) for the GA entity at 271 George Wynn Rd, Palmetto GA 30268. Only SAFER hit on 'BARUK*'/'BARUKH*' is BARUKH TRANSPORTATION LLC, USDOT 4512081, located at 1102 Yarnell Ave, Lake Wales FL (1 PU, 1 driver, ACTIVE, intrastate non-haz, no MC, no safety rating, MCS-150 12/31/2025) — Florida entity does NOT match the Georgia target address. name: Transportation Solution Services
fmcsa_address: 12175 Bridgeton Square Dr, Bridgeton, MO 63044 (physical); 10432 Baur Blvd, Olivette, MO 63132 (mailing)
entity_status: Active (operating); SAM.gov registration Expired pending renewal cycle (activated 12/16/2025, expires 12/9/2026 per SAM)
registry_source: Missouri SOS BSD (entity confirmed via SAM/UEI LK5NZ9N4RK61 and press coverage); SAM.gov/OpenGov
notes: Strong match: legal name 'Transportation Solution Services LLC' confirmed; DBA 'Axel Transportation' (axel-trans.com). Founded by Bernie Squitieri (prior founder of Express Medical Transporters, sold 2014). Specializes in student transportation (McKinney-Vento homeless transport, special needs, charter/private school) and NEMT across St. Louis/Kansas City/Springfield, MO. Approx 47 vehicles, 52 jobs created, $2.2M+ first-year sales (per company release). Acquired Trident Transportation. UEI LK5NZ9N4RK61; CAGE 85GS0; NAICS 485991 Special Needs Transportation. Strong tuck-in candidate.

name: Welltrans Inc
registry_source: Indiana SOS INBiz (Business ID 202004271388229, Domestic For-Profit Corporation)
notes: USDOT 3446804 matches WELLTRANS INC but record is INACTIVE in SAFER (no power units/drivers/MC/safety rating displayed). Indiana SOS shows entity ACTIVE: Welltrans Inc, incorporated 4/27/2020, principal office 9245 N Meridian St Ste 210, Indianapolis IN 46260 (source list shows operations address 7340 Shadeland Station, Indianapolis 46256). Registered Agent: Professional Management Enterprises, Inc. (same address as principal office), suggesting PME Logistics affiliation — Welltrans was founded in 2019/2020 as the call center / NEMT arm of PME Logistics serving Medicaid/Medicare; operates via independent contracted transportation providers rather than an owned fleet (explains inactive USDOT). Not a fleet-owning school bus operator; primarily NEMT broker/call center.
